understanding.goal_understanding: In each level, the player must reach the goal tile marked with '+' while avoiding spike tiles that end the run. You have limited attempts and turns per attempt. The objective is to complete the current BP35 level and eventually win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player can perform actions: MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, and CLICK on specific coordinates. Gravity pulls the player downward, so moving left/right may cause the player to fall to the lowest available solid tile in that column. Clicking on a tile removes it if it is clickable (likely an obstacle or a removable tile). Removing tiles can alter the terrain and allow the player to progress. The player must avoid spikes, which end the attempt. There is a step limit per attempt; if an attempt fails, the level restarts.
